subject: DIRECTIVE: display mesh spawn throttle on Operations LCARS station

body.summary: meshd already enforces DefaultMeshMaxConcurrent=1 (one claude -p at a time across entire mesh) via file locks (/tmp/mesh-spawn-slot-{N}). This represents exactly the human-scale throttle needed. Request: surface this on the Operations LCARS station.

existing_mechanism.enforcement: File locks in /tmp/mesh-spawn-slot-{N}. Gate checks active slot count before allowing spawn.

dashboard_directive.content: Active spawn slots: {N}/{max}. Show slot file count vs limit. Color: green (0 active), amber (at limit), red (reserve unlocked). Include agent_id of current slot holder if active.
dashboard_directive.data_source: Count /tmp/mesh-spawn-slot-* files. Read slot file content for holder agent_id.
